description_long: This is a standard traffic cone with a tall, conical shape and a wide, square base for stability. The cone is predominantly bright orange, featuring a single broad white reflective stripe encircling its upper midsection, which enhances visibility in low-light conditions. The surface appears smooth with a slightly matte finish, typical of flexible PVC or rubber materials used for durability and impact resistance. The tip of the cone is rounded and solid, tapering smoothly to a point without any attachments or openings. The base is flat, black, and appears to be made of a heavier material to prevent tipping, with no visible patterns or textures. There are no logos, text, or additional markings present, and the cone appears to be in new or excellent condition with no visible wear or damage.
description: A bright orange traffic cone with a wide black base and a single white reflective stripe, appearing new and undamaged.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height of the orange cone, the white reflective stripe, and the square black base.
description_view_1: Side view nearly identical to the front, with the reflective stripe and base clearly visible.
description_view_2: Another rotated view, showing the same features: orange cone, white stripe, and black base.
description_view_3: Rear view, visually similar to the other sides, with the reflective stripe and base in clear view.
attribute_reflective_stripes: One wide, white reflective stripe encircles the upper midsection of the cone.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is rounded, solid, and orange, with no attachments or openings.
attribute_base_design: The base is square, flat, and black, appearing thick and stable, likely weighted for stability, with a smooth surface and no visible patterns.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible.
